l:dependency.name: Gradle Plugin
l:dependency.l:description: The Jenkins Plugins Parent POM Project

l:dependency.name: Font Awesome API Plugin
l:dependency.l:description: Provides the free fonts of Font Awesome for Jenkins plugins.

l:dependency.name: OWASP Java HTML Sanitizer
l:dependency.l:description: Takes third-party HTML and produces HTML that is safe to embed in your web application. Fast and easy to configure.

l:dependency.name: Jakarta Mail API
l:dependency.l:description: Plugin providing the Jakarta Mail API for other plugins

l:dependency.name: Configuration Maven extension
l:dependency.l:description: The Jenkins Plugins Parent POM Project

l:dependency.name: Apache Commons BeanUtils
l:dependency.l:description: Apache Commons BeanUtils provides an easy-to-use but flexible wrapper around reflection and introspection.

l:dependency.name: Apache Commons Collections
l:dependency.l:description: Types that extend and augment the Java Collections Framework.

l:dependency.name: Prism API Plugin
l:dependency.l:description: Provides Prism JS Source Code Highlighting for Jenkins plugins.

l:dependency.name: Commons Digester
l:dependency.l:description: The Digester package lets you configure an XML to Java object mapping module which triggers certain actions called rules whenever a particular pattern of nested XML elements is recognized.

l:dependency.name: Apache Commons Validator
l:dependency.l:description: Apache Commons Validator provides the building blocks for both client-side and server-side data validation. It may be used standalone or with a framework like Struts.

l:dependency.name: OWASP Markup Formatter Plugin
l:dependency.l:description: Sanitize HTML markup in user-submitted text to be displayed on the Jenkins UI.

l:dependency.name: Caffeine API Plugin
l:dependency.l:description: Jenkins plugin that packages Caffeine for use by other plugins.
